title: BS in Computer Science and English - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
BS in Computer Science and English - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
BS in Computer Science and English
Apply now
Request info
The BS in Computer Science and English is a combined major (Khoury College and the College of Social Sciences and Humanities) focused on the interdisciplinary processes of creating, interpreting, and analyzing written texts and programs. Apply modern technology and humanities skills as you work with information and solve programming problems. Through coursework, research, and experiential learning that combines communication and critical judgment, you’ll gain the creativity and adaptability you need to use technology in literary studies.
Explore program requirements in the course catalog
Program details
Career prospects
Career prospects
This interdisciplinary program offers a unique blend of skills in technology, communication, and critical thinking, preparing you for careers in a range of fields. Some career prospects include:
Technical writer
Content developer for tech companies
Information architect
Quality assurance analyst
User experience (UX) writer
Co-ops and internships
Co-ops and internships
Through our top-ranked co-op program, you will apply your classroom knowledge in real-world industry settings. These opportunities will help you build hands-on experience and valuable connections. Co-ops include:
Software engineer co-op at Apple
Developer co-op at Rightpoint Consulting
User experience co-op at Boston Interactive
Java developer at Boston Children’s Hospital
Learn more about co-ops
Research opportunities
Research opportunities
Engage in cutting-edge research, where you’ll collaborate with top-tier researchers in state-of-the-art facilities. This experience will empower you to explore global challenges and make meaningful discoveries. Learn more about our  research areas, including:
Artificial intelligence
Games
Natural language processing and information retrieval
Explore research at Khoury College
Learning outcomes
Learning outcomes
In this program, you’ll learn to:
Apply design principles in the construction of software systems of varying complexity.
Use current techniques, skills, and tools necessary for effective and secure computing practice.
Apply mathematical foundations, algorithmic principles, and computer science theory in the modeling and design of computer-based systems in a way that demonstrates comprehension of the tradeoffs involved in design choices.
Campus location
Boston
Located in the heart of Boston, Northeastern’s oldest campus is home to a vibrant community of students, researchers, and faculty working across disciplines to build a better world through CS.
Explore Boston's campus
Applications and admissions
Deadlines
Deadlines
Learn more about our undergraduate early action, early decision, and regular decision options.
Explore deadlines
Degree costs
Degree costs
Pursuing a world-class education is an investment in your future. It’s also one of the most important decisions you’ll ever make. Visit our Undergraduate Admissions site to find current Northeastern University costs. You can also estimate the cost of your degree using our College Cost Estimator or Net Price Calculator.
Find and estimate degree costs
Financial aid and scholarships
Financial aid and scholarships
Northeastern University offers a range of financial aid and scholarship opportunities to help you fund your education. You’ll receive an initial financial aid package that outlines your options after admission. Once you enroll, Khoury College has multiple scholarship opportunities for current students to continue supporting your studies. We also encourage all students to submit the FAFSA to determine your eligibility for federal aid and loans.
Learn more about scholarship opportunities
Have questions?
Have questions?
Let us know if you have any questions about the application or enrollment process. We are here to help!
Contact an enrollment counselor
Meet our faculty
Get to know the engaged, experienced professors who are here to support you every step of the way.
View all faculty
David Smith
David Smith is an associate professor at Khoury College. His research spans the fields of natural language processing, computational linguistics, information retrieval, machine learning, digital libraries, digital humanities, and political science.
Read bio
Visit the College of Social Sciences and Humanities
The BS in Computer Science and English program is an interdisciplinary collaboration with the College of Social Sciences and Humanities.
Learn about the College of Social Sciences and Humanities
Get a head start on your graduate degree
In our accelerated master’s programs, you can start earning your master’s degree while you are still pursuing your undergraduate studies.
Browse accelerated BS+MS programs
Related programs
BS in Computer Science and Philosophy
The BS in Computer Science and Philosophy will prepare you with skills in formal logic and an understanding of the ethical and social issues related to computing and information technologies.

BS in Computer Science and Political Science
The BS in Computer Science and Political Science provides an understanding of the role of technology in policymaking as you address global and societal challenges using computer science.
